# MNT-cycle native constraint accounting report

This report is generated by `crates/mnt_cycle_constraints`. It is not a production folding circuit. It is a reproducible accounting model for the MNT-native relation layer that the future folding implementation should use.

## Operation model

| Operation | Multiplication constraints |
|---|---:|
| Native Fp multiplication | 1 |
| Native Fp addition/equality | 0 |
| Fq2 multiplication, Karatsuba | 3 |
| Fq2 square | 2 |
| Fq4 multiplication | 9 |
| Fq4 square | 4 |
| Fq4 sparse line multiplication | 6 |

## Miller relation breakdown

| Scenario | Shared square constraints | Sparse line constraints | Total |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Single pair | 1508 | 3006 | 4514 |
| Multi pair, n=2 | 1508 | 6012 | 7520 |
| Multi pair, n=4 | 1508 | 12024 | 13532 |

## Line-cache relation breakdown

| Component | Constraints |
|---|---:|
| Double-line consistency checks, 377 steps | 15834 |
| Addition-line consistency checks, 124 steps | 3720 |
| Commitment binding, public hash equality only | 0 |
| Total line-cache relation | 19554 |

## Final exponentiation relation comparison

| Model | Constraints |
|---|---:|
| Direct final exponentiation chain, 753 steps | 6777 |
| Residue/relation check, 5 segments | 110 |
| Saved constraints in the model | 6667 |

## Prepared pairing relation estimate

| Component | Constraints |
|---|---:|
| Miller transition relation, 377 rounds and 124 addition steps | 4514 |
| Line-cache relation | 19554 |
| Final exponentiation residue relation, 5 segments | 110 |
| Total prepared residue relation | 24178 |
| Direct final exponentiation reference only | 6777 |

## Comparison anchors

| Scenario | Constraints |
|---|---:|
| MNT-native prepared/residue relation model | 24178 |
| MNT-native model with direct FE reference | 30845 |
| BN254 emulated pairing reference | 1393318 |
| Sonobe-like Ethereum decider reference | 9000000 |

## Interpretation

The current Solidity verifier remains a BN254 verification envelope for EVM compatibility. The numbers above are the intended MNT-native relation layer: it is the part that should later be folded over the MNT4/MNT6 cycle. The report therefore must not be read as a claim that the existing BN254 circuit proves the whole MNT4 pairing with this number of constraints.
